name: Future Mod
description: Press a key while a level is finishing to instantly exit the level, skipping the end animation, delay, and completion screen.

skip-end.name: Exit Level Ending
skip-end.description: Press this while a level is finishing to instantly exit the level, skipping the end animation, the delay, and the completion screen. The level still counts as completed. Only active during the ending, so it's safe to set to your jump key (e.g. Space).

macro-record.name: Macro: Record
macro-record.description: Toggle recording your inputs as a step-indexed macro. Because it indexes by physics step (not time), recording while the game is slowed down by other mods still captures clicks correctly. Recording restarts on death, so it captures the attempt you actually complete.

macro-play.name: Macro: Play
macro-play.description: Toggle replaying the recorded macro from the start of the attempt.
